# INSpatialEvent.unknown

**Case**

A constant indicating an unknown trigger condition.

## Declaration

```swift
case unknown
```

## Constants

- **INSpatialEvent.arrive**: A constant indicating to deliver events upon arriving at the specified location.
- **INSpatialEvent.depart**: A constant indicating to deliver events upon leaving the specified location.

items.description: A constant indicating to deliver events upon arriving at the specified location.
